passives.name: Everlasting
passives.effects: {{tip|immobilize|Immobilizing}}, or {{tip|slow|slowing}} if you are {{tip|melee}}, an enemy champion grants a 100 {{as|(+ {{fd|4.5}}% '''current''' mana)}} {{tip|shield}} for 3 seconds (8 second cooldown). The shield's strength is increased{{ft|by 80%|to 180 {{as|(+ {{ap|4.5*1.8}}% '''current''' mana)}}}}if there is more than one enemy champion within {{tip|cr|icononly=true}} 1200 units.

effects_structured.raw: {{tip immobilize Immobilizing}}, or {{tip slow slowing}} if you are {{tip melee}}, an enemy champion grants a 100 {{as (+ {{fd 4.5}}% '''current''' mana)}} {{tip shield}} for 3 seconds (8 second cooldown)
The shield's strength is increased{{ft by 80% to 180 {{as (+ {{ap 4.5*1.8}}% '''current''' mana)}}}}if there is more than one enemy champion within {{tip cr icononly=true}} 1200 units.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Shop sell value was corrected to Tier-1 canonical dataset/page values during Tear-line sibling review.
Everlasting is modeled as a reactive shield trigger on enemy-champion immobilize (or melee slow) with 3-second uptime and 8-second cooldown.
Multi-enemy amplification is modeled as a conditional shield-strength increase when more than one enemy champion is within 1200 units.
